title: GraveChest
description: GraveChest is a Minecraft plugin that spawns a chest at your death spot and gives you a locked compass so you can always find your stuff.
body:
# ⚰️ GraveChest

GraveChest automatically spawns a chest full of your gear at the spot where you die and hands you a special compass that always points back to it. The compass is **locked**, so you can’t accidentally drop it or stash it in another container—making it super easy to find and reclaim your stuff.

---

## 💡 Why I Made This

After testing a few grave‐type mods, I noticed they often broke or didn’t work well on newer Paper builds. I wanted a simple, reliable solution that just works—no more lost items or confusing setups. GraveChest is lightweight, easy to configure, and keeps your death drops safe until you get back.

---

## 🛠️ Contributing

Found a bug or want to suggest a feature? Open an issue or submit a pull request on GitHub—contributions are always welcome!  
- Make sure your code follows Java 17+ conventions.  
- Test on Paper 1.21+ before submitting.

---

## 💬 Join the Community

Hop into the Discord to chat, share feedback, or stay updated on new features: 👉 [https://discord.gg/QAWEbFb9eF](https://discord.gg/QAWEbFb9eF)

---

## ☕ Support Me on Ko-fi

If you enjoy GraveChest and want to support future development (or just say thanks!), you can buy me a coffee on Ko-fi: 👉 [https://ko-fi.com/imagineforgee](https://ko-fi.com/imagineforgee)

Your support helps keep projects like this alive and maintained—thank you!
